name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: When Real-Debrid rejects a torrent (its copyright filter returns infringing_file), DebridHub now automatically tries the next-best release for the same episode/movie instead of giving up. RD blocks per torrent hash, so an alternate release of the same content usually goes through.
